reviews.author: Darshana Khanzode
reviews.review_body: Very conducive environment to work. Caters to the holistic development of the child. Very good lab facilities. Excellent place to to work.

reviews.author: muzammil ghulam
reviews.review_body: We are so happy and thankful to The millennium school (119)for helping our child learn so much....they don't just teach from books but also make our child understands everything in a fun way.The teachers are very caring and loving.

reviews.author: Dhirendra Singh
reviews.review_body: Education is of utmost importance, and it is essential for the government to encourage the establishment of schools in all cities simultaneously. However, merely providing land and approval for school openings should not be the sole responsibility of the government. They must also ensure that schools have appropriate parking facilities and prioritize the safety of the children. Currently, there are schools lacking proper parking for parents and school buses, leading to severe traffic congestion during school dispersal. Therefore, the government should take this matter into consideration and address the issue accordingly.

reviews.author: Pankaj Sehgal
reviews.review_body: It's been 2 years, my daughters are studying in The Millennium School, Noida Sector 119. They are in class II. It's been a fantastic experience and we can see the difference in our daughters in terms of enhanced skills, learning of new concepts, confident Whilst speaking and sharing their thoughts and above all making new friends. School teachers and leadership team is doing a fab job. The way they managed studies during pandemic was incredible and even after pandemic, we are happy with in school safety measures. Time to time, different fests school has organized - Innovation fest, Cultural fest. Brilliant arrangement. I would highly recommend TMS 119 basis upon my wonderful experience..
